info.title: Computer Science and Engineering
info.description: Located in Hamirpur district of Himachal Pradesh, NIT Hamirpur enjoys a really scenic environment and pleasant weather.
Established in 1989 as the Department of Computer Science & Engineering, we have an excellent history and strong academic culture.

programme.name: B.Tech
programme.details: Four-year undergraduate programme focusing on core foundations and emerging technologies.

programme.name: M.Tech
programme.details: Postgraduate excellence in Computer Science and Information Security.

programme.name: Ph.D
programme.details: Advanced doctoral research programs in modern computing domains.

field.title: AI & ML
field.description: Research in machine learning and intelligent systems.

field.title: Cyber Security
field.description: Advanced security protocols and privacy systems.

field.title: Cloud Computing
field.description: Distributed systems and scalable computing research.
